revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:比都佐神社]] {{Expand Japanese|比都佐神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hitsusa Shrine | native_name = 比都佐神社 | image = Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Torii.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hitsusa Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.007496|136.228022}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hitsusa Shrine'''|比都佐神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 34 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039806|ltq=Q135039806|qid=Q135039806|1=Ohoyano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Namura Shrine|lt=Namura Shrine|en|Namura Shrine|ja|苗村神社|ms|Kuil Namura|qid=Q11616123|1=Namura Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1208020|ltq=Q1208020|qid=Q1208020|1=Hino, Shiga}} * {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Gamō District, Shiga|lt=Gamo district|ceb|Gamō-gun|en|Gamō District, Shiga|es|Distrito de Gamō (Shiga)|fa|شهرستان گامو، شیگا|fr|District de Gamō|hu|Gamó körzet|id|Distrik Gamō, Shiga|it|Distretto di Gamō|ja|蒲生郡|ko|가모군 (시가현)|ms|Daerah Gamō, Shiga|pl|Powiat Gamō|ru|Гамо|zh|蒲生郡|qid=Q931658|1=Gamō District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.007496|136.228022}} == image (P18) == * Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Torii.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181814 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q855025|ltq=Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ひつさじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 6160005005964 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県蒲生郡日野町十禅師410', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:比都佐神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11547502}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed| date = November 2024}} {{神社 |名称 = Hitsusa Shrine |画像 = [[File:Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Torii.jpg|270px]]
Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|frame-height=}} |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Gamō District|Q931658|qid=Q931658|1=Gamō District, Shiga}}{{ill|lt=Hino, Shiga|Q1208020|qid=Q1208020|lt=Hino|1=Hino, Shiga}}Jūzenji 410 |緯度度=35 |緯度分 =0 |緯度秒 =27.9 |経度度=136 |経度分 =13 |経度秒 =40.3 |地図=Japan Shiga |ラベル位置=bottom |祭神 = Hikohohodemi-no-Mikoto and 8 others |社格 = {{ill|lt=small Shikinaisha|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}} |創建 = Founding period unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=irimoya-zukuri|Q855025|qid=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 14|Q2500|qid=Q2500|1=April 14}} |神事 = }} '''Hitsusa Shrine''' (ひつさじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Jūzenji, {{ill|lt=Hino, Shiga|Q1208020|qid=Q1208020|lt=Hino|1=Hino, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Gamō District|Q931658|qid=Q931658|1=Gamō District, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Its former rank was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=kensha|1=Ken-sha|qid=Q90139226}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Hoori|Q1051960|qid=Q1051960|lt=Hikohohodemi-no-Mikoto|1=Hoori}} * {{ill|lt=Ninigi|Q1056017|qid=Q1056017|lt=Amatsu-hiko-ho-ninigi-no-Mikoto|1=Ninigi-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime|Q1781862|qid=Q1781862|lt=Konohana-sakuya-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Konohanasakuya-hime}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Kami|1=Takemikazuchi}} * {{ill|lt=Futodama|Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|qid=Q11059539|lt=Ame-no-Futodama-no-Kami|1=Futodama}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Kami|Q1107286|qid=Q1107286|1=Futsunushi}} * {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Kami|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Kami|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami|qid=Q3090037}} === Shrine crest === * Mitsudomoe === History === A {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha candidate shrine|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki inner-shrine candidate}}. It is the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Hissa-gō. In the medieval era it became shrine land of Hiyoshi Shrine (present {{ill|lt=Hiyoshi Taisha|Q656451|qid=Q656451|1=Hiyoshi Taisha}}), and after soliciting {{ill|lt=Jūzen Gongen|Q123524325|qid=Q123524325|lt=Jūzen Gongen|1=Jūzenji}} (present {{ill|lt=subsidiary shrine|Q135009904|qid=Q135009904|1=Sessha}} Juge-no-miya at Hiyoshi Taisha), one of the Hiyoshi seven shrines, it was called "Hitsusa Jūzenji"The current deity of Juge-no-miya is {{ill|lt=Tamayori-hime|Q56344982|qid=Q56344982|lt=Kamo Tamayori-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamayori-hime}}. . In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 15 ({{ill|lt=1882|Q7812|qid=Q7812|1=1882}}) it became a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, in {{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 15 ({{ill|lt=1926|Q5259|qid=Q5259|1=1926}}) a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, and in {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|qid=Q18782|1=1931}}) a kensha. === Festivals === * April 14 Annual Festival === Shrine buildings === According to the preserved "Gokan Uketori Nikki" at the shrine, records remain of rebuilding shrine buildings four times: in {{ill|lt=Ōan|Q1146245|qid=Q1146245|1=Ōan}} 4 ({{ill|lt=1371|Q6255|qid=Q6255|1=1371}}), {{ill|lt=Bunmei (Japan)|Q1193544|qid=Q1193544|lt=Bunmei|1=Bunmei}} 18 ({{ill|lt=1486|Q6646|qid=Q6646|1=1486}}), {{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} 2 ({{ill|lt=1717|Q6895|qid=Q6895|1=1717}}), and {{ill|lt=Bunka (era)|Q1373146|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 5 ({{ill|lt=1808|Q6914|qid=Q6914|1=1808}}). The shrine buildings were lost in a fire in Meiji 17 ({{ill|lt=1884|Q7819|qid=Q7819|1=1884}}), but rebuilt two years later in Meiji 19. ファイル:Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Honden.jpg|alt=|Honden ファイル:Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Haiden.jpg|alt=|Haiden ファイル:Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Kaguraden.jpg|alt=|Kagura hall === Precinct shrines === * Kōdaijingū * Nogami Shrine === Cultural property === * {{ill|lt=Hōkyōintō|Q3146365|qid=Q3146365|1=Hōkyōintō}} - bears the inscription "{{ill|lt=Kagen|Q1327409|qid=Q1327409|1=Kagen}} 2, Kinoe-Tatsu ({{ill|lt=1304|Q5619|qid=Q5619|1=1304}}), 12th month, 2nd day." National {{ill|lt=Important Cultural Property|Q1188622|qid=Q1188622|1=Important Cultural Property (Japan)}}. ファイル:Hitsusa-jinja 2022 Hokyointo.jpg|alt=|Hōkyōintō === Notes === {{reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=760 Hitsusa Shrine] (Shiga Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{pref-stub|pref=滋賀県}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hitsusa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hitsusa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:滋賀県の重要文化財]] [[Category:滋賀県日野町の歴史]] [[Category:滋賀県日野町の建築物]]
